proof_report.validation proof: rg inspection found _build_agent_prompt, resolve_upgrade_source, _preferred_git_runner_command, and _managed_skills_path source policy markers.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: memory.prompt behavior includes prompt wording, recorded upgrade source resolution, local runner selection, and legacy layout detection, so this was not a safe fast-path generated-runtime slice.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Create a bounded plan for Audit memory prompt runtime reduction.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The bounded slice determined that memory.prompt should not be reduced by copying source policy into generated code. The larger #892 epic remains open.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: no-safe-route audit for memory.prompt generated-runtime reduction
execution_summary.validation confirmed: rg inspection confirmed prompt policy/source-resolution markers; planning closeout remained bounded
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: decomposition records memory.prompt as explicit package-domain runtime debt until template/source-resolution primitives exist

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: No generated-code reduction was implemented because memory.prompt is policy-heavy package-domain behavior, not a small deterministic fast path.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: prompt wording, source resolution, local runner selection, and layout detection remain explicit source-runtime debt in the inventory.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A future IR primitive/template set can represent prompt rendering and source resolution without copying package source mechanics.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
